title: CAMBIVO 2 Pack Patella Tendon Knee Strap, Knee Support Brace for Women Men, Adjustable Band for Hiking, Soccer, Basketball, Baseball, Running, Tennis, Volleyball, Squats
features: IDEAL for KNEECAP STABILIZING: Designed for knee and sport-related protection.The knee strap holds the patella around the knee and absorb the shocks, provide extra support stabilize your knees.

FULLY ADJUSTABLE TENDON STRAP:Double-knot Design; Fully adjustable; The perfect-fit of the patella knee support for running reduces the pressure on the patella tendon and thus helps to provide a boost of support while running or exercising; Regain your stability; Especially crafted for people suffering from knee instability

COMFORTABLE FIT & ANTI-SLIP DESIGN: Protects and provide extra support for the knee during outdoor sports; Highly Fashionable; Premium permeability and absorption ability; Easy to wash; Does not restrict movement and allows you to perform physical activities with ease The added padding provides good support for the knee- especially when when going uphill or downhill

HIGH QUALITY & DURABLE:These adjustable Patella Knee Strap are made from high-quality material which is both durable, yet soft and breathable for a comfortable fit. Get a 'comfortable' feeling at your knees. The fabric is chosen to absorb sweat and thus, prevents any wet or slippery feeling on the knee

SATISFACTION GUARANTEE- We stand behind the quality products we made. We are committed to our customer's satisfaction. If there is any problem, please don't hesitate to contact us, We will reply to you in 24 hours
Reliable Quality Backed by 2-Year Satisfaction: CAMBIVO Patella Tendon Knee Strap backed by a 2-year warranty, ensuring customers' long-term satisfaction and dependable performance.
